name: Tipco Asphalt Public Company Limited
summary: Tipco Asphalt Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes asphalt and petroleum products in Thailand and internationally. The company offers asphalt cement, cutback asphalt, asphalt emulsion, modified asphalt emulsion, and premium grade asphalt products; special products, including premixes, joint sealers, joint primers, jet fuel resistant joint sealants, and binders for tropical bridges; and industrial lubricants, as well as naphtha, and gas and fuel oil products. It also engages in shipping management and agency, and marine transportation activities. The company owns, operates, and manages a fleet of eight asphalt tankers. Tipco Asphalt Public Company Limited was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
